decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_nyc-dot already matches the canonical registry record entity_nyc-dot (New York City Department of Transportation, agency). The observation is consistent with that record — NYC DOT is described as presenter and lead agency for the Utica Avenue study. No different record is a better match; the observation already resolves to its own base_record_id.

Observation base_record_id entity_community-board-9-brooklyn-brt-nostrand already matches the canonical registry record for Brooklyn Community Board 9. The registry record already includes source 2013_09_24_sbs_utica_cb9 and alias entity_community-board-9-brooklyn-2013-09-24 — confirming this observation is already scoped within that record. No different record is a better match.

Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct already matches the canonical registry record entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit, agency). The registry record already lists source 2013_09_24_sbs_utica_cb9 and alias entity_mta-nyct-2013-09-24-utica-cb9. The description as partner agency for Transit Signal Priority on Utica Avenue is consistent. No different record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Implement Transit Signal Priority from Kings Highway to Broadway (with NYCT)
